# @sjlouji/design-system — Component Catalog
> Auto-generated 2026-06-09. Refresh with `npm run generate:llm-context`.

## Import
```ts
import { Button, Field, Input, ... } from '@sjlouji/design-system'
```

## Stack
- React 19 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS v4
- Radix UI primitives, class-variance-authority (CVA) for variants
- `cn()` = clsx + tailwind-merge for className merging

## Design Tokens
CSS custom properties available globally:
```
--background  --foreground
--primary     --primary-foreground
--secondary   --secondary-foreground
--muted       --muted-foreground
--accent      --accent-foreground
--destructive
--border  --input  --ring  --radius
```

## Rules
- Always import from `@sjlouji/design-system` — never reimplement components
- Wrap every form input with `Field` (handles label, error, helperText, aria)
- Use `variant` / `size` props for styling, not raw className overrides
- Use `cn()` when composing classNames

---

## Accordion
**Category:** Components/Accordion

```tsx
<Accordion {...args}>
      <AccordionItem value="item-1">
        <AccordionTrigger>What is a design system?</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>
          A design system is a collection of reusable components guided by clear
          standards.
        </AccordionContent>
      </AccordionItem>
      <AccordionItem value="item-2">
        <AccordionTrigger>Why use Tailwind CSS?</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>
          Tailwind CSS provides utility-first styling that makes it easy to build
          consistent UIs rapidly.
        </AccordionContent>
      </AccordionItem>
      <AccordionItem value="item-3">
        <AccordionTrigger>What is Radix UI?</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>
          Radix UI provides accessible, unstyled component primitives for React.
        </AccordionContent>
      </AccordionItem>
    </Accordion>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, Single, Multiple, CssCheck, ExpandInteraction

---

## Alert
**Category:** Components/Alert

```ts
interface AlertProps {
  variant?: 'default' | 'destructive' // default: 'default'
  // ...extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>
}
```

```tsx
<Alert className="w-[400px]">
      <AlertTitle>Heads up!</AlertTitle>
      <AlertDescription>
        You can add components to your app using the CLI.
      </AlertDescription>
    </Alert>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, Destructive, WithIcon, CssCheck, AllVariantsCheck

---

## AlertDialog
**Category:** Components/AlertDialog

```tsx
<AlertDialog>
      <AlertDialogTrigger asChild>
        <button className="rounded-md bg-destructive px-4 py-2 text-sm text-white">
          Delete account
        </button>
      </AlertDialogTrigger>
      <AlertDialogContent>
        <AlertDialogHeader>
          <AlertDialogTitle>Delete account?</AlertDialogTitle>
          <AlertDialogDescription>
            This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your
            account and remove your data from our servers.
          </AlertDialogDescription>
        </AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogFooter>
          <AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
          <AlertDialogAction variant="destructive">Delete</AlertDialogAction>
        </AlertDialogFooter>
      </AlertDialogContent>
    </AlertDialog>
```

---

## AspectRatio
**Category:** Components/AspectRatio

```tsx
<div className="w-[400px]">
      <AspectRatio ratio={16 / 9}>
        <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-muted text-sm text-muted-foreground">
          16:9
        </div>
      </AspectRatio>
    </div>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Ratio16by9, Ratio4by3, Square

---

## AutoSuggest
**Category:** Components/AutoSuggest

```ts
interface AutoSuggestOption {
  value: string
  label: string
  description?: string
}

interface AutoSuggestProps {
  options: AutoSuggestOption[]
  value?: string
  onChange?: (value: string) => void
  onSelect?: (option: AutoSuggestOption) => void
  placeholder?: string
  loading?: boolean
  emptyMessage?: string
  filterOptions?: boolean
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<AutoSuggest placeholder="Search frameworks…" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithDescriptions, Loading, EmptyState, WithDefaultValue, NoFilter, Disabled

---

## Avatar
**Category:** Components/Avatar

```tsx
<Avatar>
      <AvatarImage src="https://i.pravatar.cc/40" alt="User avatar" />
      <AvatarFallback>JD</AvatarFallback>
    </Avatar>
```

**Variants/Stories:** WithImage, WithFallback, Fallback

---

## AvatarGroup
**Category:** Primitives/AvatarGroup

```ts
interface AvatarItem {
  src?: string
  fallback: string
  alt?: string
}

interface AvatarGroupProps {
  avatars: AvatarItem[]
  max?: number
  size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<AvatarGroup max={4} size="md" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithOverflow, Sizes

---

## Badge
**Category:** Components/Badge

```ts
interface BadgeProps {
  variant?: 'default' | 'secondary' | 'destructive' | 'outline' | 'ghost' | 'link' // default: 'default'
  asChild?: boolean
  // ...extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>
}
```

```tsx
<Badge>Default</Badge>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, Secondary, Destructive, Outline, CssCheck, AllVariants

---

## BoardLayout
**Category:** DataDisplay/BoardLayout

```ts
interface BoardCard {
  id: string
  title: string
  description?: string
  badge?: string
  assignee?: { name: string; avatar?: string }
  priority?: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high' | 'critical'
}

interface BoardColumn {
  id: string
  title: string
  cards: BoardCard[]
  color?: string
}

interface BoardLayoutProps {
  columns: BoardColumn[]
  onCardMove?: (
    cardId: string,
    fromColumnId: string,
    toColumnId: string,
    newIndex: number,
  ) => void
  onColumnsChange?: (columns: BoardColumn[]) => void
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<BoardLayout />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, EmptyColumns, SingleColumn

---

## Branding
**Category:** Navigation/Branding

```tsx
<Branding name="Acme" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithTagline, Small, Large, WithCustomLogo, AsLink

---

## Breadcrumb
**Category:** Components/Breadcrumb

```tsx
<Breadcrumb>
      <BreadcrumbList>
        <BreadcrumbItem>
          <BreadcrumbLink href="/">Home</BreadcrumbLink>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
        <BreadcrumbSeparator />
        <BreadcrumbItem>
          <BreadcrumbLink href="/products">Products</BreadcrumbLink>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
        <BreadcrumbSeparator />
        <BreadcrumbItem>
          <BreadcrumbPage>Item</BreadcrumbPage>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
      </BreadcrumbList>
    </Breadcrumb>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithEllipsis

---

## BreadcrumbGroup
**Category:** Navigation/BreadcrumbGroup

```tsx
<BreadcrumbGroup label="Home" href="/" label="Projects" href="/projects" label="Design System" current />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, LongPath, SingleItem, WithCurrentPage

---

## Button
**Category:** Components/Button

```ts
interface ButtonProps {
  variant?: 'default' | 'destructive' | 'outline' | 'secondary' | 'ghost' | 'link' // default: 'default'
  size?: 'default' | 'xs' | 'sm' | 'lg' | 'icon' // default: 'default'
  asChild?: boolean
  // ...extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>
}
```

```tsx
<Button>Button</Button>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, Secondary, Destructive, Outline, Ghost, Link, WithIcon, Loading, AllSizes, CssCheck, DisabledOpacity, ClickInteraction

---

## ButtonDropdown
**Category:** Components/ButtonDropdown

```ts
interface DropdownAction {
  label: string
  onClick?: () => void
  icon?: React.ReactNode
  disabled?: boolean
  destructive?: boolean
}

interface ButtonDropdownProps {
  label: string
  onClick?: () => void
  actions: DropdownAction[]
  variant?: 'default' | 'outline' | 'secondary'
  size?: 'sm' | 'default' | 'lg'
  disabled?: boolean
  loading?: boolean
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<ButtonDropdown label="Save" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, Outline, Secondary, Loading, Disabled, SmallSize, LargeSize, WithDisabledAction

---

## ButtonGroup
**Category:** Forms/ButtonGroup

```ts
interface ButtonGroupProps {
  children: React.ReactNode
  orientation?: 'horizontal' | 'vertical'
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<ButtonGroup {...args}>
      <Button variant="outline">One</Button>
      <Button variant="outline">Two</Button>
      <Button variant="outline">Three</Button>
    </ButtonGroup>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithIcons, Vertical, Sizes

---

## Calendar
**Category:** Components/Calendar

```tsx
<Calendar mode="single" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, Selected

---

## Card
**Category:** Components/Card

```tsx
<Card className="w-[380px]">
      <CardHeader>
        <CardTitle>Card Title</CardTitle>
        <CardDescription>Card description goes here.</CardDescription>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        <p>This is the main card content area.</p>
      </CardContent>
      <CardFooter className="gap-2">
        <Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button>
        <Button>Save</Button>
      </CardFooter>
    </Card>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, Simple

---

## Carousel
**Category:** Components/Carousel

```tsx
<Carousel className="w-full max-w-xs">
      <CarouselContent>
        {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((item) => (
          <CarouselItem key={item}>
            <div className="flex aspect-square items-center justify-center rounded-lg border bg-muted p-6 text-2xl font-semibold">
              {item}
            </div>
          </CarouselItem>
        ))}
      </CarouselContent>
      <CarouselPrevious />
      <CarouselNext />
    </Carousel>
```

---

## Chart
**Category:** Components/Chart

---

## ChatInput
**Category:** AI/ChatInput

```ts
interface ChatInputProps {
  value?: string
  onChange?: (value: string) => void
  onSubmit?: (value: string) => void
  placeholder?: string
  disabled?: boolean
  loading?: boolean
  maxLength?: number
  attachSlot?: React.ReactNode
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<ChatInput placeholder="Message the AI…" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, Loading, WithMaxLength, WithAttachSlot

---

## ChatMessage
**Category:** AI/ChatMessage

```ts
interface ChatMessageProps {
  role: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'system'
  content: string
  avatar?: { src?: string; fallback: string }
  timestamp?: string
  streaming?: boolean
  actions?: React.ReactNode
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<ChatMessage role="user" content="Hello! Can you explain how React hooks work?" fallback="U" timestamp="2:34 PM" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** UserMessage, AssistantMessage, Streaming, SystemMessage, WithActions

---

## ChatShell
**Category:** AI/ChatShell

```ts
interface ChatShellProps {
  sidebar?: React.ReactNode
  header?: React.ReactNode
  children: React.ReactNode
  footer?: React.ReactNode
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<ChatShell
      sidebar={
        <ConversationList
          conversations={conversations}
          onSelect={(id) => console.log('Select:', id)}
          onDelete={(id) => console.log('Delete:', id)}
        />
      }
      header={
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <span className="font-medium text-sm">React performance tips</span>
          <ModelSelector models={models} value="claude-sonnet-4" />
        </div>
      }
      footer={<ChatInput placeholder="Message Claude…" onSubmit={(v) => console.log(v)} />}
    >
      <ChatThread className="h-full">
        <ChatMessage role="user" content="How can I optimise React rendering?" avatar={{ fallback: 'U' }} timestamp="2:00 PM" />
        <ChatMessage
          role="assistant"
          content="There are several techniques to optimise React rendering:\n\n- **React.memo** — prevents re-renders when props haven't changed\n- **useMemo / useCallback** — memoize expensive computations\n- **Code splitting** — lazy load components with `React.lazy`"
          avatar={{ fallback: 'AI' }}
          timestamp="2:01 PM"
        />
      </ChatThread>
    </ChatShell>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithoutSidebar

---

## ChatThread
**Category:** AI/ChatThread

```ts
interface ChatThreadProps {
  children: React.ReactNode
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<ChatThread className="h-[400px] border rounded-lg">
      <ChatMessage role="user" content="Hello! How are you?" avatar={{ fallback: 'U' }} timestamp="2:00 PM" />
      <ChatMessage role="assistant" content="I'm doing great, thanks for asking! How can I help you today?" avatar={{ fallback: 'AI' }} timestamp="2:00 PM" />
      <ChatMessage role="user" content="Can you write a hello world in TypeScript?" avatar={{ fallback: 'U' }} timestamp="2:01 PM" />
      <ChatMessage
        role="assistant"
        content={`Sure! Here's hello world in TypeScript:\n\n\`\`\`typescript\nconst greeting: string = "Hello, World!";\nconsole.log(greeting);\n\`\`\``}
        avatar={{ fallback: 'AI' }}
        timestamp="2:01 PM"
      />
    </ChatThread>
```

**Variants/Stories:** WithMessages, Empty

---

## Checkbox
**Category:** Components/Checkbox

```tsx
<Checkbox id="default" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, Checked, Disabled, WithLabel, CssCheck, ToggleInteraction

## CodeBlock
**Category:** DataDisplay/CodeBlock

```ts
interface CodeBlockProps {
  code: string
  language?: string
  filename?: string
  showLineNumbers?: boolean
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<CodeBlock />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithFilename, WithLanguage, WithLineNumbers, LongCode

---

## CodeEditor
**Category:** Components/CodeEditor

```ts
interface CodeEditorProps {
  value?: string
  onChange?: (value: string) => void
  language?: CodeLanguage
  theme?: 'light' | 'dark'
  readOnly?: boolean
  lineNumbers?: boolean
  placeholder?: string
  height?: string
  minHeight?: string
  maxHeight?: string
  filename?: string
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<CodeEditor language="javascript" height="200px" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, JSON, DarkTheme, WithFilename, ReadOnly, NoLineNumbers, WithPlaceholder

---

## Collapsible
**Category:** Components/Collapsible

```tsx
<Collapsible className="w-[350px] space-y-2">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold">Starred repositories</h4>
        <CollapsibleTrigger asChild>
          <button className="flex items-center rounded-md p-1 text-sm hover:bg-muted">
            <ChevronDownIcon className="size-4" />
            <span className="sr-only">Toggle</span>
          </button>
        </CollapsibleTrigger>
      </div>
      <div className="rounded-md border px-4 py-2 text-sm">@radix-ui/primitives</div>
      <CollapsibleContent className="space-y-2">
        <div className="rounded-md border px-4 py-2 text-sm">@radix-ui/colors</div>
        <div className="rounded-md border px-4 py-2 text-sm">@stitches/react</div>
      </CollapsibleContent>
    </Collapsible>
```

---

## Combobox
**Category:** Forms/Combobox

```tsx
<Combobox placeholder="Select a framework..." searchPlaceholder="Search frameworks..." emptyMessage="No framework found." />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithDescription, Disabled, Controlled

---

## Command
**Category:** Components/Command

```tsx
<Command className="rounded-lg border shadow-md w-[400px]">
      <CommandInput placeholder="Type a command or search..." />
      <CommandList>
        <CommandEmpty>No results found.</CommandEmpty>
        <CommandGroup heading="Suggestions">
          <CommandItem>
            <CalendarIcon />
            Calendar
          </CommandItem>
          <CommandItem>
            <SearchIcon />
            Search
          </CommandItem>
          <CommandItem>
            <SettingsIcon />
            Settings
          </CommandItem>
        </CommandGroup>
      </CommandList>
    </Command>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithGroups

---

## ContextMenu
**Category:** Components/ContextMenu

```tsx
<ContextMenu>
      <ContextMenuTrigger asChild>
        <div className="flex h-[150px] w-[300px] items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-dashed text-sm text-muted-foreground">
          Right-click here
        </div>
      </ContextMenuTrigger>
      <ContextMenuContent>
        <ContextMenuLabel>Actions</ContextMenuLabel>
        <ContextMenuSeparator />
        <ContextMenuItem>Back</ContextMenuItem>
        <ContextMenuItem>Reload</ContextMenuItem>
        <ContextMenuSeparator />
        <ContextMenuItem>Save as...</ContextMenuItem>
        <ContextMenuItem variant="destructive">Delete</ContextMenuItem>
      </ContextMenuContent>
    </ContextMenu>
```

---

## ConversationList
**Category:** AI/ConversationList

```ts
interface Conversation {
  id: string
  title: string
  preview?: string
  timestamp?: string
  active?: boolean
}

interface ConversationListProps {
  conversations: Conversation[]
  onSelect?: (id: string) => void
  onDelete?: (id: string) => void
  onRename?: (id: string, newTitle: string) => void
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<ConversationList />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithActiveItem, Empty

---

## CopyButton
**Category:** Primitives/CopyButton

```ts
interface CopyButtonProps {
  value: string
  size?: 'sm' | 'md'
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<CopyButton value="npm install @design-system/react" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithLabel, SmallSize

---

## DataTable
**Category:** DataDisplay/DataTable

```ts
interface DataTableProps {
  data: TData[]
  columns: ColumnDef<TData, any>[]
  searchable?: boolean
  searchPlaceholder?: string
  selectable?: boolean
  pagination?: boolean
  pageSize?: number
  loading?: boolean
  emptyMessage?: string
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<DataTable />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithSearch, WithSelection, Loading, Empty

---

## DateInput
**Category:** Components/DateInput

```ts
interface DateInputProps {
  value?: Date
  onChange?: (date: Date | undefined) => void
  placeholder?: string
  format?: string
  disabled?: boolean
  error?: boolean
  min?: Date
  max?: Date
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<DateInput />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithValue, USFormat, ISOFormat, WithMinMax, ErrorState, Disabled

---

## DatePicker
**Category:** Forms/DatePicker

```tsx
<DatePicker placeholder="Pick a date" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithValue, Disabled, Controlled

---

## DateRangeInput
**Category:** Components/DateRangeInput

```ts
interface DateRange {
  from?: Date
  to?: Date
}

interface DateRangeInputProps {
  value?: DateRange
  onChange?: (range: DateRange | undefined) => void
  placeholder?: string
  format?: string
  disabled?: boolean
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<DateRangeInput />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithValue, StartOnly, USFormat, Disabled, CustomPlaceholder

---

## Dialog
**Category:** Components/Dialog

```tsx
<Dialog>
      <DialogTrigger asChild>
        <Button variant="outline">Open Dialog</Button>
      </DialogTrigger>
      <DialogContent>
        <DialogHeader>
          <DialogTitle>Edit profile</DialogTitle>
          <DialogDescription>
            Make changes to your profile here. Click save when you are done.
          </DialogDescription>
        </DialogHeader>
        <div className="py-4">
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Profile form content goes here.</p>
        </div>
        <DialogFooter>
          <Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button>
          <Button>Save changes</Button>
        </DialogFooter>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, CssCheck, OpenCloseInteraction

---

## Direction
**Category:** Utilities/Direction

```ts
interface DirectionProps {
  dir?: Direction
  children: React.ReactNode
}
```

```tsx
<Direction dir="ltr">
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Left-to-right (default)</p>
        <SelectDemo />
      </div>
    </Direction>
```

**Variants/Stories:** LTR, RTL

---

## Drawer
**Category:** Components/Drawer

```tsx
<Drawer>
      <DrawerTrigger asChild>
        <Button variant="outline">Open Drawer</Button>
      </DrawerTrigger>
      <DrawerContent>
        <DrawerHeader>
          <DrawerTitle>Edit profile</DrawerTitle>
          <DrawerDescription>
            Make changes to your profile here.
          </DrawerDescription>
        </DrawerHeader>
        <div className="p-4">
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Drawer content goes here.</p>
        </div>
        <DrawerFooter>
          <Button>Save changes</Button>
          <DrawerClose asChild>
            <Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button>
          </DrawerClose>
        </DrawerFooter>
      </DrawerContent>
    </Drawer>
```

---

## DropdownMenu
**Category:** Components/DropdownMenu

```tsx
<DropdownMenu>
      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
        <Button variant="outline">Open Menu</Button>
      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
      <DropdownMenuContent className="w-56">
        <DropdownMenuItem>Profile</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Billing</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Settings</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuItem variant="destructive">Log out</DropdownMenuItem>
      </DropdownMenuContent>
    </DropdownMenu>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithIcons, WithGroups

---

## EmptyState
**Category:** Layout/EmptyState

```tsx
<EmptyState title="No messages" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithDescription, WithAction, SmallSize

---

## Field
**Category:** Forms/Field

```ts
interface FieldProps {
  label?: string
  htmlFor?: string
  helperText?: string
  error?: string
  required?: boolean
  children: React.ReactNode
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<div className="w-72">
      <Field label="Email" htmlFor="email">
        <Input id="email" type="email" placeholder="you@example.com" />
      </Field>
    </div>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithHelperText, WithError, Required

---

## FieldGroup
**Category:** Forms/FieldGroup

```ts
interface FieldGroupProps {
  title?: string
  description?: string
  children: React.ReactNode
  className?: string
  columns?: 1 | 2 | 3
}
```

```tsx
<div className="w-80">
      <FieldGroup title="Personal Information">
        <Field label="First Name" htmlFor="first">
          <Input id="first" placeholder="Joan" />
        </Field>
        <Field label="Last Name" htmlFor="last">
          <Input id="last" placeholder="Smith" />
        </Field>
        <Field label="Email" htmlFor="email">
          <Input id="email" type="email" placeholder="you@example.com" />
        </Field>
      </FieldGroup>
    </div>
```

**Variants/Stories:** SingleColumn, TwoColumns, WithDescription

---

## FileAttachment
**Category:** AI/FileAttachment

```ts
interface FileAttachmentProps {
  filename: string
  size?: string
  type?: string
  url?: string
  onRemove?: () => void
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<FileAttachment filename="document.txt" size="12 KB" type="text/plain" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, PDFFile, ImageFile, WithRemove, WithDownload

---

## FileDropzone
**Category:** Components/FileDropzone

```ts
interface FileDropzoneProps {
  accept?: string
  multiple?: boolean
  maxSize?: number
  onFilesAccepted?: (files: File[]) => void
  onFilesRejected?: (files: File[], reason: string) => void
  disabled?: boolean
  className?: string
  children?: React.ReactNode
}
```

```tsx
<FileDropzone />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, ImagesOnly, PDFOnly, MultipleFiles, WithMaxSize, Disabled, CustomContent

---

## FileUpload
**Category:** Components/FileUpload

```ts
interface UploadFile {
  id: string
  file: File
  progress: number
  status: 'pending' | 'uploading' | 'done' | 'error'
  error?: string
}

interface FileUploadProps {
  onUpload?: (files: File[]) => void
  files?: UploadFile[]
  onRemove?: (fileId: string) => void
  accept?: string
  multiple?: boolean
  maxSize?: number
  disabled?: boolean
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<FileUpload />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithUploadingFiles, WithMixedStatuses, MultipleFiles, ImagesOnly, WithMaxSize, Disabled

---

## Form
**Category:** Forms/Form

**Variants/Stories:** Default, ProfileForm

---

## Header
**Category:** Navigation/Header

```tsx
<Header name="Jane Smith" email="jane@example.com" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithoutNav, MinimalHeader

---

## HoverCard
**Category:** Components/HoverCard

```tsx
<HoverCard>
      <HoverCardTrigger asChild>
        <span className="cursor-pointer underline decoration-dotted underline-offset-4">
          @johndoe
        </span>
      </HoverCardTrigger>
      <HoverCardContent>
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
          <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold">John Doe</h4>
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            Software engineer and open source contributor. Building cool things.
          </p>
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Joined December 2021</p>
        </div>
      </HoverCardContent>
    </HoverCard>
```

---

## Input
**Category:** Components/Input

```tsx
<Input className="w-[300px]" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithPlaceholder, Disabled, TypeEmail, TypePassword, TypeSearch, CssCheck, TypeInteraction, ClearInteraction

---

## InputGroup
**Category:** Forms/InputGroup

```ts
interface InputGroupProps {
  prefix?: React.ReactNode
  suffix?: React.ReactNode
  children: React.ReactNode
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<div className="w-64">
      <InputGroup prefix="$">
        <Input placeholder="0.00" />
      </InputGroup>
    </div>
```

**Variants/Stories:** WithPrefix, WithSuffix, WithBothSides, WithIconPrefix

---

## InputOTP
**Category:** Components/InputOTP

---

## Item
**Category:** Primitives/Item

```ts
interface ItemProps {
  icon?: React.ReactNode
  label: string
  description?: string
  trailing?: React.ReactNode
  onClick?: () => void
  active?: boolean
  disabled?: boolean
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<Item label="Profile" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithDescription, WithTrailing, Clickable, Active, Disabled, List

---

## Kbd
**Category:** Primitives/Kbd

```ts
interface KbdProps {
  children: React.ReactNode
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<Kbd>⌘K</Kbd>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Single, Combination, InlineWithText

```tsx
<Label>Email address</Label>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithHtmlFor

```tsx
<div className="p-6">
      <LayoutRow gap={4}>
        <Box label="Box 1" />
        <Box label="Box 2" />
        <Box label="Box 3" />
      </LayoutRow>
    </div>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, Centered, SpaceBetween, Wrapped

```ts
interface MarkdownMessageProps {
  content: string
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<MarkdownMessage content="This is a simple paragraph of text rendered from markdown." />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Simple, WithCode, WithList, WithTable, Full

---

## Menubar
**Category:** Components/Menubar

```tsx
<Menubar>
      <MenubarMenu>
        <MenubarTrigger>File</MenubarTrigger>
        <MenubarContent>
          <MenubarItem>
            New Tab <MenubarShortcut>⌘T</MenubarShortcut>
          </MenubarItem>
          <MenubarItem>
            New Window <MenubarShortcut>⌘N</MenubarShortcut>
          </MenubarItem>
          <MenubarSeparator />
          <MenubarItem>Print</MenubarItem>
        </MenubarContent>
      </MenubarMenu>
      <MenubarMenu>
        <MenubarTrigger>Edit</MenubarTrigger>
        <MenubarContent>
          <MenubarItem>
            Undo <MenubarShortcut>⌘Z</MenubarShortcut>
          </MenubarItem>
          <MenubarItem>
            Redo <MenubarShortcut>⇧⌘Z</MenubarShortcut>
          </MenubarItem>
          <MenubarSeparator />
          <MenubarItem>Cut</MenubarItem>
          <MenubarItem>Copy</MenubarItem>
          <MenubarItem>Paste</MenubarItem>
        </MenubarContent>
      </MenubarMenu>
      <MenubarMenu>
        <MenubarTrigger>View</MenubarTrigger>
        <MenubarContent>
          <MenubarItem>Zoom In</MenubarItem>
          <MenubarItem>Zoom Out</MenubarItem>
          <MenubarSeparator />
          <MenubarItem>Full Screen</MenubarItem>
        </MenubarContent>
      </MenubarMenu>
    </Menubar>
```

---

## MessageActions
**Category:** AI/MessageActions

```ts
interface MessageActionsProps {
  onCopy?: () => void
  onRegenerate?: () => void
  onThumbsUp?: () => void
  onThumbsDown?: () => void
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<MessageActions />
```

**Variants/Stories:** AllActions, CopyOnly, WithFeedback

```ts
interface MessageFeedbackProps {
  onSubmit: (rating: 'positive' | 'negative', comment?: string) => void
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<MessageFeedback />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, FeedbackSelected

## ModelSelector
**Category:** AI/ModelSelector

```ts
interface AIModel {
  id: string
  name: string
  provider: string
  contextWindow?: number
  description?: string
}

interface ModelSelectorProps {
  models: AIModel[]
  value?: string
  onChange?: (modelId: string) => void
  disabled?: boolean
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<ModelSelector value="claude-sonnet-4" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, SingleModel, Disabled

---

```ts
interface NativeSelectProps {
  placeholder?: string
  error?: boolean
}
```

```tsx
<div className="w-48">
      <NativeSelect defaultValue="apple">{options}</NativeSelect>
    </div>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithPlaceholder, WithError, Disabled

## NavigationMenu
**Category:** Components/NavigationMenu

```tsx
<NavigationMenu>
      <NavigationMenuList>
        <NavigationMenuItem>
          <NavigationMenuTrigger>Products</NavigationMenuTrigger>
          <NavigationMenuContent>
            <div style={{ padding: '1rem', minWidth: '200px' }}>
              <NavigationMenuLink href="#">Analytics</NavigationMenuLink>
              <NavigationMenuLink href="#">Dashboard</NavigationMenuLink>
              <NavigationMenuLink href="#">Reports</NavigationMenuLink>
            </div>
          </NavigationMenuContent>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
        <NavigationMenuItem>
          <NavigationMenuTrigger>Company</NavigationMenuTrigger>
          <NavigationMenuContent>
            <div style={{ padding: '1rem', minWidth: '200px' }}>
              <NavigationMenuLink href="#">About</NavigationMenuLink>
              <NavigationMenuLink href="#">Careers</NavigationMenuLink>
            </div>
          </NavigationMenuContent>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
        <NavigationMenuItem>
          <NavigationMenuLink href="#">Blog</NavigationMenuLink>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
      </NavigationMenuList>
    </NavigationMenu>
```

## Pagination
**Category:** Components/Pagination

```tsx
<Pagination>
      <PaginationContent>
        <PaginationItem>
          <PaginationPrevious href="#" />
        </PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>
          <PaginationLink href="#">1</PaginationLink>
        </PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>
          <PaginationLink href="#" isActive>2</PaginationLink>
        </PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>
          <PaginationLink href="#">3</PaginationLink>
        </PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>
          <PaginationLink href="#">4</PaginationLink>
        </PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>
          <PaginationLink href="#">5</PaginationLink>
        </PaginationItem>
        <PaginationItem>
          <PaginationNext href="#" />
        </PaginationItem>
      </PaginationContent>
    </Pagination>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, FirstPage, LastPage

---

## Popover
**Category:** Components/Popover

```tsx
<Popover>
      <PopoverTrigger asChild>
        <button
          style={{
            border: '1px solid #ccc',
            borderRadius: 6,
            padding: '6px 12px',
            cursor: 'pointer',
          }}
        >
          Open Popover
        </button>
      </PopoverTrigger>
      <PopoverContent>
        <PopoverHeader>
          <PopoverTitle>Popover Title</PopoverTitle>
          <PopoverDescription>This is the popover description with some content.</PopoverDescription>
        </PopoverHeader>
      </PopoverContent>
    </Popover>
```

```tsx
<Progress value={50} className="w-[300px]" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, Zero, Full, Loading

## PromptCard
**Category:** AI/PromptCard

```ts
interface PromptCardProps {
  title: string
  content: string
  category?: string
  onUse?: () => void
  onCopy?: () => void
  onDelete?: () => void
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<PromptCard title="Summarise article" content="Please summarise the following article in 3 bullet points, focusing on the key takeaways and actionable insights." />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithCategory, WithAllActions

## PromptInput
**Category:** AI/PromptInput

```ts
interface PromptInputProps {
  value?: string
  onChange?: (v: string) => void
  onSubmit?: (v: string) => void
  placeholder?: string
  maxTokens?: number
  currentTokens?: number
  disabled?: boolean
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<PromptInput placeholder="Write a short story about…" />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithTokenCount, NearLimit, Disabled

## PromptLibrary
**Category:** AI/PromptLibrary

```ts
interface PromptCardData {
  id: string
  title: string
  content: string
  category?: string
}

interface PromptLibraryProps {
  prompts: PromptCardData[]
  onUse?: (id: string) => void
  onCopy?: (id: string) => void
  onDelete?: (id: string) => void
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<PromptLibrary />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, Empty, WithFilter

## RadioGroup
**Category:** Components/RadioGroup

```tsx
<RadioGroup>
      <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.5rem' }}>
        <RadioGroupItem value="option-1" id="option-1" />
        <Label htmlFor="option-1">Option 1</Label>
      </div>
      <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.5rem' }}>
        <RadioGroupItem value="option-2" id="option-2" />
        <Label htmlFor="option-2">Option 2</Label>
      </div>
      <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.5rem' }}>
        <RadioGroupItem value="option-3" id="option-3" />
        <Label htmlFor="option-3">Option 3</Label>
      </div>
    </RadioGroup>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithDefaultValue, Disabled

---

## Resizable
**Category:** Components/Resizable

```tsx
<ResizablePanelGroup orientation="horizontal" style={{ height: '200px', border: '1px solid #ccc' }}>
      <ResizablePanel defaultSize={50}>
        <div style={{ padding: '1rem', height: '100%', background: '#f5f5f5' }}>
          Left Panel
        </div>
      </ResizablePanel>
      <ResizableHandle withHandle />
      <ResizablePanel defaultSize={50}>
        <div style={{ padding: '1rem', height: '100%', background: '#e5e5e5' }}>
          Right Panel
        </div>
      </ResizablePanel>
    </ResizablePanelGroup>
```

**Variants/Stories:** TwoPanels, ThreePanels, Vertical

---

## ScrollArea
**Category:** Components/ScrollArea

```tsx
<ScrollArea className="h-[200px] w-[300px] rounded-md border p-4">
      {tags.map((tag) => (
        <div key={tag} style={{ padding: '4px 0', fontSize: 14 }}>
          {tag}
        </div>
      ))}
    </ScrollArea>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, Horizontal

---

## SearchInput
**Category:** Forms/SearchInput

```ts
interface SearchInputProps {
  value?: string
  onChange?: (value: string) => void
  onClear?: () => void
  placeholder?: string
  debounce?: number
  loading?: boolean
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<div className="w-72">
      <SearchInput {...args} />
    </div>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, Controlled, Loading, WithClear, WithDebounce

```tsx
<Select>
      <SelectTrigger className="w-[180px]">
        <SelectValue placeholder="Select a fruit" />
      </SelectTrigger>
      <SelectContent>
        <SelectItem value="apple">Apple</SelectItem>
        <SelectItem value="banana">Banana</SelectItem>
        <SelectItem value="cherry">Cherry</SelectItem>
        <SelectItem value="mango">Mango</SelectItem>
        <SelectItem value="orange">Orange</SelectItem>
      </SelectContent>
    </Select>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithPlaceholder, Disabled, CssCheck, OpenAndSelectInteraction

## Separator

```tsx
<div className="w-64">
      <p className="text-sm text-foreground">Above the separator</p>
      <Separator className="my-4" />
      <p className="text-sm text-foreground">Below the separator</p>
    </div>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Horizontal, Vertical, WithLabel

## Sheet
**Category:** Components/Sheet

**Variants/Stories:** Right, Left, Top, Bottom

---

## Sidebar
**Category:** Components/Sidebar

```ts
interface SidebarProps {
  variant?: 'default' | 'outline' // default: 'default'
  size?: 'default' | 'sm' | 'lg' // default: 'default'
  // ...extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>
}
```

```tsx
<SidebarProvider>
      <Sidebar>
        <SidebarHeader>
          <div style={{ padding: '0.5rem', fontWeight: 600, fontSize: 14 }}>My App</div>
        </SidebarHeader>
        <SidebarContent>
          <SidebarGroup>
            <SidebarGroupLabel>Navigation</SidebarGroupLabel>
            <SidebarGroupContent>
              <SidebarMenu>
                {navItems.map((item) => (
                  <SidebarMenuItem key={item.title}>
                    <SidebarMenuButton asChild>
                      <a href={item.href}>
                        <item.icon />
                        <span>{item.title}</span>
                      </a>
                    </SidebarMenuButton>
                  </SidebarMenuItem>
                ))}
              </SidebarMenu>
            </SidebarGroupContent>
          </SidebarGroup>
        </SidebarContent>
      </Sidebar>
      <SidebarInset>
        <header style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', padding: '0.75rem 1rem', borderBottom: '1px solid #eee' }}>
          <SidebarTrigger />
          <span style={{ marginLeft: '0.5rem', fontWeight: 500 }}>Dashboard</span>
        </header>
        <main style={{ padding: '1.5rem' }}>
          <p>Main content area</p>
        </main>
      </SidebarInset>
    </SidebarProvider>
```

---

## Sonner
**Category:** Components/Sonner

```tsx
<div>
      <Toaster />
      <button
        style={{
          border: '1px solid #ccc',
          borderRadius: 6,
          padding: '6px 12px',
          cursor: 'pointer',
        }}
        onClick={() => toast('Event has been created', { description: 'Monday, January 3rd at 6:00pm' })}
      >
        Show Toast
      </button>
    </div>
```

## StatusBadge
**Category:** Primitives/StatusBadge

```ts
interface StatusBadgeProps {
  status: Status
  label?: string
  showDot?: boolean
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
      <StatusBadge status="online" />
      <StatusBadge status="offline" />
      <StatusBadge status="busy" />
      <StatusBadge status="away" />
      <StatusBadge status="pending" />
    </div>
```

**Variants/Stories:** AllStatuses, WithLabel, WithoutDot

---

## Stepper
**Category:** Navigation/Stepper

```ts
interface StepperStep {
  id: string
  title: string
  description?: string
  optional?: boolean
}

interface StepperProps {
  steps: StepperStep[]
  currentStep: number
  onStepClick?: (index: number) => void
  orientation?: 'horizontal' | 'vertical'
  className?: string
}

interface UseStepperReturn {
  currentStep: number
  next: () => void
  prev: () => void
  goTo: (index: number) => void
  isFirst: boolean
  isLast: boolean
  isComplete: boolean
}
```

```tsx
<Stepper currentStep={0} />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, Step2Active, AllComplete, Vertical, Interactive

---

## StreamingText
**Category:** AI/StreamingText

```ts
interface StreamingTextProps {
  text: string
  streaming?: boolean
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<StreamingText text="This is a static message with no streaming cursor." streaming={false} />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Static, Streaming, Empty

```tsx
<Switch />
```

---

## Table
**Category:** Components/Table

```tsx
<Table>
      <TableCaption>A list of recent invoices.</TableCaption>
      <TableHeader>
        <TableRow>
          <TableHead>Invoice</TableHead>
          <TableHead>Status</TableHead>
          <TableHead>Method</TableHead>
          <TableHead className="text-right">Amount</TableHead>
        </TableRow>
      </TableHeader>
      <TableBody>
        {invoices.map((invoice) => (
          <TableRow key={invoice.id}>
            <TableCell>{invoice.id}</TableCell>
            <TableCell>{invoice.status}</TableCell>
            <TableCell>{invoice.method}</TableCell>
            <TableCell className="text-right">{invoice.amount}</TableCell>
          </TableRow>
        ))}
      </TableBody>
    </Table>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithFooter

---

## Tabs
**Category:** Components/Tabs

```ts
interface TabsProps {
  variant?: 'default' | 'line' // default: 'default'
  // ...extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>
}
```

```tsx
<Tabs defaultValue="account" className="w-[400px]">
      <TabsList>
        <TabsTrigger value="account">Account</TabsTrigger>
        <TabsTrigger value="password">Password</TabsTrigger>
        <TabsTrigger value="settings">Settings</TabsTrigger>
      </TabsList>
      <TabsContent value="account">
        <p style={{ padding: '1rem 0', fontSize: 14 }}>
          Make changes to your account here. Click save when you are done.
        </p>
      </TabsContent>
      <TabsContent value="password">
        <p style={{ padding: '1rem 0', fontSize: 14 }}>
          Change your password here. After saving, you will be logged out.
        </p>
      </TabsContent>
      <TabsContent value="settings">
        <p style={{ padding: '1rem 0', fontSize: 14 }}>
          Update your settings and preferences.
        </p>
      </TabsContent>
    </Tabs>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, DefaultValue, CssCheck, SwitchTabInteraction

---

```tsx
<Textarea className="w-[320px]" />
```

```tsx
<ThinkingBlock defaultOpen={false}>The user is asking about the capital of France. The answer is Paris.</ThinkingBlock>
```

```ts
interface ToggleProps {
  variant?: 'default' | 'outline' // default: 'default'
  size?: 'default' | 'sm' | 'lg' // default: 'default'
  // ...extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>
}
```

```tsx
<Toggle>Toggle</Toggle>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, Pressed, Outline, WithIcon, Sizes

## ToggleGroup
**Category:** Components/ToggleGroup

```tsx
<ToggleGroup type="single" defaultValue="center">
      <ToggleGroupItem value="left" aria-label="Align left">
        <AlignLeftIcon />
      </ToggleGroupItem>
      <ToggleGroupItem value="center" aria-label="Align center">
        <AlignCenterIcon />
      </ToggleGroupItem>
      <ToggleGroupItem value="right" aria-label="Align right">
        <AlignRightIcon />
      </ToggleGroupItem>
    </ToggleGroup>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, Multiple, SingleVariant, OutlineVariant

```ts
interface TokenCounterProps {

  max: number

}
```

```tsx
<TokenCounter current={1200} max={8000} />
```

```tsx
<Tooltip>
      <TooltipTrigger asChild>
        <button
          style={{
            border: '1px solid #ccc',
            borderRadius: 6,
            padding: '6px 12px',
            cursor: 'pointer',
          }}
        >
          Hover me
        </button>
      </TooltipTrigger>
      <TooltipContent>
        <p>This is a tooltip</p>
      </TooltipContent>
    </Tooltip>
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, DestructiveContent, LeftSide


**Variants/Stories:** Default, WithIcons, WithBadges, Disabled

---

## TreeView
**Category:** DataDisplay/TreeView

```ts
interface TreeNode {
  id: string
  label: string
  icon?: React.ReactNode
  children?: TreeNode[]
  disabled?: boolean
  badge?: string | number
}

interface TreeViewProps {
  nodes: TreeNode[]
  defaultExpanded?: string[]
  selected?: string
  onSelect?: (nodeId: string) => void
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<TreeView />
```

**Variants/Stories:** Default, FileTree, SingleLevel, WithBadges, Controlled

---

## TypingIndicator
**Category:** AI/TypingIndicator

```ts
interface TypingIndicatorProps {
  className?: string
}
```

```tsx
<TypingIndicator />
```

---

## Typography
**Category:** Typography/Typography

```ts
interface TypographyProps {
  variant?: TypographyVariant
  as?: React.ElementType
  className?: string
  children?: React.ReactNode
}
```

```tsx
<div className="flex flex-col gap-4 max-w-xl">
      <Typography variant="h1">Heading 1</Typography>
      <Typography variant="h2">Heading 2</Typography>
      <Typography variant="h3">Heading 3</Typography>
      <Typography variant="h4">Heading 4</Typography>
      <Typography variant="p">
        Paragraph — The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
      </Typography>
      <Typography variant="lead">
        Lead — A larger introductory paragraph.
      </Typography>
      <Typography variant="large">Large text</Typography>
      <Typography variant="small">Small text</Typography>
      <Typography variant="muted">Muted text</Typography>
      <Typography variant="blockquote">
        Blockquote — "Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works."
      </Typography>
      <Typography variant="code">const greeting = "hello world"</Typography>
      <Typography variant="list" as="ul">
        <li>First item</li>
        <li>Second item</li>
        <li>Third item</li>
      </Typography>
    </div>
```

**Variants/Stories:** AllVariants, Heading, Body
